column1: # Transcribed verbatim from the datasheet "Table 3-1 Pin Description",
# N32L40xx8/xB Datasheet (94pp), the "Alternate function" column ONLY.
# The "Optional function" column (ADC_INx, COMPx_INy, OPAMPx_VINz, WKUP,
# OSC, TAMP, RTC_OUT, USB_DM/DP, etc.) is deliberately EXCLUDED -- those are
# analog/special connections, not AFL/AFH-muxed digital alternate functions.
# SIGNAL names are the datasheet's, of form <PERIPH>_<pinfunc> (e.g. SPI1_NSS).
# The peripheral prefix is what gets matched against af_map.txt.
# Hand-transcribed data, not generated. Verify against datasheet Table 3-1.
# LCD_SEG*/LCD_COM* are included (they are AF10/AF11). EVENTOUT is AF3.
